column1: This file was created using the 202602 CRSP database.
It contains value- and equal-weighted returns for portfolios formed on D/P.
D/P is computed when the portfolios are constructed
The annual returns are from January to December.
Missing data are indicated by -99.99 or -999.
The break points include utilities and include financials.
The  portfolios  include utilities and include financials.
Value Weight Returns -- Annual from January to December
Equal Weight Returns -- Annual from January to December
